summary: Software Engineer with 4+ years of experience developing scalable enterprise web applications using PHP and Laravel. Experienced in building Government ERP systems, BRAC Fleet Management solutions, legal case management platforms, and high-performance backend services with a strong focus on backend optimization, API design, and cloud deployment.

highlights: Working on the BPATC Government ERP system with secure RBAC and enterprise workflow management.
Developing the BRAC Fleet Management System with vehicle tracking and logistics-focused modules.
Building the BRAC Case Hub legal case management platform for structured legal operations.
Improving scalability through modular architecture and performance optimization.
Built backend architecture for OTT platforms with scalable APIs and service-oriented integrations.
Integrated AWS CloudFront CDN for optimized media and video delivery pipelines.
Improved application performance with ElasticSearch, Algolia, and Redis.
Developed Laravel-based CRM systems and business automation tools for internal operations.

projects.name: Fleet Management
projects.description: Enterprise fleet solution focused on vehicle operations, logistics workflows, and operational visibility.

projects.name: Legal App (BRAC Case Hub)
projects.description: Case management platform for organizing legal matters, workflow handling, and structured operational collaboration.

projects.name: BPATC Government ERP
projects.description: Secure ERP platform designed for role-based access, internal workflows, and scalable enterprise modules.
